news.headline: China-led team develops AI system to track radar-disrupting space hurricanes
news.summary:
A China-led team has developed an AI system to detect space hurricanes, a phenomenon in the Earth’s upper atmosphere that can disrupt satellite signals, radar and radio communications.

news.headline: World Cup debutants Curaçao clinch historic first point after holding Ecuador to draw
news.summary: Tiny Curaçao, the smallest nation ever to qualify for a World Cup, clinched their maiden point on Saturday after battling to a 0-0 draw against Ecuador in Kansas City thanks to ​an outstanding performance from goalkeeper ⁠Eloy Room.

news.headline: Cross-border biotech deals grow more complex as US targets China investment links
news.summary:
Cross-border biotech deals between China and the United States are becoming more complicated and could face a modest slowdown as Washington steps up efforts to restrict investment and technology transfers, according to industry analysts.

news.headline: To lead in global education, Hong Kong must go beyond narrow metrics
news.summary:
Hong Kong’s universities are often celebrated for their global rankings, research output and international reputation. Yet behind these achievements lies a quieter, more fundamental question: how do we define academic excellence and are we measuring the right things?

news.headline: Concerns raised as Hong Kong stops compiling voter turnout data by age and sex
news.summary:
Hong Kong election authorities have stopped compiling voter turnout data by age and sex, citing a lack of operational need, in a move that has raised concerns about undermining the transparency of polls.

news.headline: ‘Only death can stop me’: terminally ill Chinese tycoon works 12 hours daily to cure ALS
news.summary:
A former Chinese e-commerce executive in the final stages of a rare disease is still working 12-hour days, devoting what time he has left to accelerating the search for a cure.

news.headline: France bans alcohol at music festival events under red heatwave alert
news.summary: Annual street parties attended by millions ordered to help “preserve” healthcare services in 40C (104F) heat.

news.headline: Cape Verde Will Count on Vozinha Against Uruguay at the World Cup
news.summary: Cape Verde’s veteran goalkeeper, Vozinha, is keeping the archipelago nation’s hopes outsized after his performance against soccer giant Spain.
